1.q: As the first step in the L-galactose pathway of AsA biosynthesis, phosphomannose isomerase (PMI) catalyzes the reversible isomerization of Fru-6P and mannose-6-phosphate (Man-6P).

2.q: As the first step in the L-galactose pathway of AsA biosynthesis, phosphomannose isomerase (PMI) catalyzes the reversible isomerization of Fru-6P and mannose-6-phosphate (Man-6P).
